mechanics.excerpt: Attribute Check using BOD and STR would be called BOD/STR Check: The base TN for an Attribute Check depends on whether single Attribute is used or two are used: BABE TARGET NUMBER The higher the base target number (TN) assigned to task the more difficult it will be. Although sometimes an experienced gamemaster can simply assign TN and be done with it, most circumstances more detailed and precise system is called for.
